2 ?06 0100010100 3
3 ?17 1100101000 4

Constant
2 C 2 1111111111 a mismatch
2 C 2n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
2 I 0 0111000111 6 mismatch
2 I 0n 1000111000 4 mismatch

2 I 6 0011010011 5 mismatch
2 I 6n 1100101100 5 mismatch

Binary 06
2 AND 06 0011000011 4 mismatch
2 AND 06n 1100111100 6 mismatch
2 OR 06 0111010111 7 mismatch
2 OR 06n 1000101000 3 mismatch
2 XOR 06 0100010100 3 match 1/2

2 0100010100 3
3 1100101000 4
Starting at I 5 increasing

left 11
Starting at I 2 decreasing
I 1 0011110001 partial 1111011001 7

2 I 0
3 I 1

Selected
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 XOR 06
3 XOR 17
4 I 2
5 I 3
6 I 4
7 I 5

Applying to 11011011
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 4 = 1
1 I 5 = 0
2 XOR 06 = XOR(I 0,I 6) = XOR(1,1) = 0
3 XOR 17 = XOR(I 1,I 7) = XOR(1,1) = 0
4 I 2 = 0
5 I 3 = 1
6 I 4 = 1
7 I 5 = 0

\boxed{10000110}
